signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY | NO new annual figure | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's latest monthly inflation rate rose to 2.16% year-over-year in March 2026 (from 2.00% in February), with a 0.34% month-to-month increase; this is the most recent data point available as of April 15, 2026, but no new annual 2026 figure has been announced or resolved.[3]
